entry.title: Re: how to consume ODATA while performing CRUD operation...
entry.content:
Hi. @shrutikah

"Employees" entity set is read-only.
so Create, Update, and Delete operation are not possible,
only Read operation is possible.

For more information, please refer to the link below.
https://services.odata.org/v2/

Additionally,
OData Protocol exists up to V2, V3, and V4.
but SAPUI5 Framework only supports V2 and V4.

I hope for good results!

entry.title: Issue with hasdraftentity in sap cap odata v4
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have worked on list report based on SAP CAP, when i select any line item i get below error, Any suggestions are appreciated

Error : Failed to drill-down into (ID=48243eff-54a4-4e0d-b7b6-5f11057bc663,IsActiveEntity=true)/HasDraftEntity, invalid segment: HasDraftEntity - monitor/Invoices?$count=true

Error : Failed to drill-down into (ID=48243eff-54a4-4e0d-b7b6-5f11057bc663,IsActiveEntity=true)/DraftAdministrativeData, invalid segment: DraftAdministrativeData - monitor/Invoices?$count=true&$orderby=IssueDate%20desc

entry.title: How to create mdc.table with OData V4 application
entry.content:
Hello. I have a question.

While I am familiar with the JSON Model tutorial provided in the UI5 SDK, I am eager to learn more about developing applications using OData v4.

I understand the concepts of Delegates and PropertyInfo, but I'm facing some challenges in implementing them.

Could you please provide me with a simple example or guide to help me get started?

entry.title: Converting Xstring received from ABAP to byte Array of PDF to send via Rest API in java
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a variable of type String in java, which has XSTRING value of PDF received from ERP.
I have to convert this string in byte array, which I can send via rest API.
Please help me with utility function which I can use for this conversion.

entry.title: ONB2ProcessResponsible,ONB2ProcessTask,PickListValueV2 is not found
entry.content:
Good day, Seniors,

Candidate is unable to complete/submit "Complete Your E-Signature" task during the onboarding (2.O) process. when admin try Nudge from onboarding dashboard getting following error, please help me.

Error

Entity ONB2ProcessOverview,ONB2ActivityOverview,ONB2ActivityResponsible,getOnboardingBPEUserTaskStatus,ONB2Process,ONB2DataCollectionUserConfig,PerEmail,PicklistOption,User,PickListV2,ONB2BuddyActivity,ONB2EquipmentActivity,ONB2EquipmentType,ONB2EquipmentTypeValue,Attachment,ONB2GoalActivity,ONB2Goal,ONB2GoalCategoryConfig,ONB2LinkActivity,ONB2Link,ONB2LinkConfig,ONB2MeetingActivity,ONB2MeetingEvent,ONB2CentralMeetingEvent,ONB2MeetingParticipant,ONB2CentralOrientationMeeting,ONB2MeetingTypeConfig,ONB2OffboardingMeetingTypeConfig,ONB2MessageActivity,ONB2ActivitiesConfig,ONB2ScheduledMessageActivity,ONB2MessageRecipient,ONB2OffboardingActivitiesConfig,ONB2UsefulContactActivity,ONB2UsefulContact,ONB2WhatToBringActivity,ONB2WhatToBringConfig,ONB2WhatToBringItemConfig,ONB2ChecklistActivity,ONB2ChecklistItem,ONB2AssetActivity,ONB2AssetActivityFieldControls,ONB2Asset,ONB2AssetCategoryConfig,ONB2EquipmentType,ONB2EquipmentTypeValue,ComplianceProcess,ComplianceProcessTask,ComplianceProcessResponsible,ComplianceProcessTaskType,MDFEnumValue,I9UserData,restartOnboardingProcess,getOnboardingDocuments,getBPEUserTaskUrl,getBPETodoUserTaskUrl,ONB2WhereToGoActivity,ONB2ActivityNudgeDetails,ONB2ProcessResponsible,ONB2ProcessTask,PickListValueV2 is not found. Please contact your system administrator.

entry.title: Unable to use PATCH method to Update Production Order Component using OData Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Currently i am working on a scenario where the requirement is to update the Production Order Components values from a Third Party software, I am using OData Service: 
 https://{domain}:{port}/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/A_ProductionOrderComponent_3(Reservation=%27125%27,ReservationItem=%273%27,ReservationRecordType=%27531%27)

and testing it with the payload (shared below) : 

{
    "d": {
        "ManufacturingOrder": " 6000004",
        "ManufacturingOrderSequence": "0",
        "ManufacturingOrderOperation": "0010",
        "BOMItem": "6",
        "BOMItemCategory": "L",
        "BillOfMaterialItemNumber": "0030",
        "RequiredQuantity": "5",
        "StorageLocation": "FG01",
        "Batch": "0000000895"
    }   
}

In Postman, I am getting error as HTTP Status Code 400 with Error Text as 

Malformed URI literal syntax



CSRF : Used 
Etag i found from getting the metadata through browser. 

As referred to SAP API Hub it is having 3 fields as mandatory which are : 1. ReservationItem 2. ReservationItem 3. ReservationRecordType

But not able to find the 3rd field which is ReservationRecordType also kindly provide your feedbacks / solution on this. 


Thanks & Regards, 
Prathmesh

entry.title: How to obtain the job posting apply url
entry.content:
Hi,
Could you please provide the field name for the Apply URL in the JobRequisitionPosting entity or any other entity that contains the applyUrl field? I was unable to find a corresponding field for the URL in the entity.Additionally, could you guide us on how to retrieve the posting URL? I have referred to the documentation available here, but it does not seem to clarify this aspect.I understand that others have encountered a similar issue, but I couldn’t find a concrete solution in the resources available. Your guidance on resolving this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Unable to POST Workforce Timesheet using OData Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am working on a scenario where the requirement is to create timesheet of an employee in the SAP Public Cloud System. 

I referred to api.sap.com for the standard OData Service (https://api.sap.com/api/API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET/tryout)

As per the documentation i am posting this JSON payload : 

{
   "TimeSheetDataFields": {
      "ActivityType": "8",
      "WBSElement": "ADAPTIVE ROYALITY",
      "TimeSheetTaskType": "MISC",
      "TimeSheetNote": "THIS IS TEST NOTE",
      "RecordedHours": "9"
   },
   "TimeSheetDate": "2025-01-02T00:00:00",
   "TimeSheetIsReleasedOnSave": true
}

 But i am not able to see the response in Postman even if the response code is HTTP 200 OK

Please provide your valuable feedbacks. 


Best Regards, 
Prathmesh Sutar

entry.title: Issue: Data Not Displaying on CDS Endpoint Despite Presence in HANA Table
entry.content:
The Issue:

While working with SAP S/4HANA or SAP Cloud Platform, I encountered an issue where data in the HANA database table is not visible via the CDS endpoint, despite the data being present and accessible directly from the HANA table.


Here's a summary of the issue:

  • The data exists in the HANA table (Attached an image below).
  • A CDS view is defined to expose the data via an OData endpoint.
  • The OData service is properly registered, and the metadata is available.
  • However, when consuming the OData service, no data is returned, even though it should be.

 

 

Troubleshooting Steps We Tried:

Here are the troubleshooting steps we attempted to resolve the issue:

  1. Clearing Cache and Restarting Services
  2. Reviewing the CDS View Definition
  3. Verifying Service Registration
  4. Checking User Authorization

Investigating HANA CLI Query Results

Seeking Help from the SAP Community:

As I have encountered this issue in my own project, I would like to reach out to the SAP community for assistance. If anyone has experienced this problem or has insights on what might be causing this discrepancy, your input would be greatly appreciated.


I would love to hear from anyone in the SAP community who has encountered this issue before. Please share your insights, troubleshooting tips, or solutions to help resolve this issue. Your input will be invaluable in understanding and overcoming this challenge.

SAP Community

Node.js 

SAP HANA Cloud 

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP

entry.title: Public Cloud - Consume local service/API in ABAP code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a situation where we need to create a Sales Order using ABAP code in a Public Cloud system. We are not able to use the standard BO because the payment plan entities (which we need) are not available in I_SALESORDERTP, so the only solution we found is to use the api API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.

We tried building a solution following this tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html

But we weren’t able to make it work since I believe the tutorial is missing the communication arrangement part, which is needed to handle the connection.

We then followed the 2nd part of the tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-basic-auth.html

Which is working and creating the sales order as expected, but the problem is that is creating it with the communication user as the owner (CreatedBy field).

Is there a way to consume the API o the odata service associated in a local mode using the same user that is logged into the system? In our process the creator of the order is very important and we can’t have the communication user as creator of every sales order in the system.

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journey exercises - Error with OData Adapter
entry.content:
Hi,

I've been making my way through the Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journey exercises and am having issues with my OData Adapter.

I followed the steps by creating an external Receiver and an external call for Request Reply.

I then dragged the connection line between the two and selected the OData Adapter Type and OData V2 Message Protocol.

I filled in the configuration details as per the instructions and used the API Proxy URL that I had gained through previous exercises.

However when I save and deploy the Integration Flow I get the following Error and am not sure what it's telling me:

java.lang.NullPointerException: while trying to invoke the method com.sap.it.rt.adapter.odata.destination.facade.SecureStoreRetrieveService.getSecureStore() of a null object returned from com.sap.it.rt.adapter.odata.destination.facade.SecureStoreRetrieveServiceImpl.getInstance()

Does anyone know what I might be missing, or am possibly doing wrong to get this error?

Thanks.

entry.title: APIs for Warehousing - OData v4. Count Physical Inventory issue.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the Physical Inventory API in my BTP Application and want to perform the COUNT as described in the link. Unfortunately, I am having some troubles with it, therefore I want to understand how it is supposed to work.

To be able to perform an Inventory COUNT I have to have a Inventory Document, which I created in my SAP EWM System as we can see below.

I notice that there exists a Physical Inventory Item ( Header Item ) for this document, but no Count Item ( since I did not perform the count yet ).

To perform the COUNT I implemented the BATCH call as mentioned in the Dokumentation and when I am executing it, I get following error:

"This physical inventory item doesn't exist."

This lead to my question: 

Since the BATCH call requires this two PUT calls in it.

How can the BATCH call require a PUT request of the Physical Inventory Count Item, if the Item does not exists yet?

entry.title: Repack Products into Handling Units or Storage Bins in EWM-Managed Storage Location
entry.content:
Hello!
I have some troubles while using the Handling Unit API. I try to Repack Products as described ( https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e1841426f60f4e50913ec9a64aba8332/2e4fa69034674856a3a201c0c14bdd65.html?locale=en-US&version=2022.002 ). When executing the action, I always get the error message “ISO Code and Language Code &PC& do not match”. PC is the HandlingUnitQuantityUnit parameter, which I am using to call the function. Using different parameters leads to the same error.
Does anyone have an idea what exactly is the problem and how to solve it?
Thanks for your help.

entry.title: How to properly hide a custom column in a Fiori Elements app with OData V4?
entry.content:
Dear Fiori experts, I hope you can help me with the problem I'm facing.

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using Flexible Programming Model that we're trying to have as much metadata-driven as possible. OData interface is V4. One of my tasks is to implement a custom column with quite sophisticated set of microchartbars, therefore, I'm doing it on frontend by using CDS as my source of data. No problems so far, I've implemented this custom column in my manifest and custom xml template:

My problem is that its availability has to be dependent of another criterion, such as whether or not a user has some particular authorization. This authorization check is done on backend via custom entity and is exposed as an entity set in my OData V4 service, which I read in the onInit method in my List Page controller extension. Unfortunately, I have no idea how to hide this custom column completely if authority check fails. My best bet so far was to use .setIgnoredFields method in .onBeforeRendering method in my List Page controller extension, but for some reason setIgnoredFields works only with columns that come from backend (Plant, Material, etc.), but it totally ignores if I put there my custom column name, no matter what. In the below example it will hide Plant column entirely, but leaves ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn column.

I tried "ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", "DataField::

ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", etc. - no effect. What am I doing wrong and how to do it properly?

I also tried to use all sorts of expression bindings for "availability" in the manifest, but it seems this property is immune to it...

I appreciate every bit of help.

entry.title: I need to use custom rap api in intgeration suite but i am getting error when loading the metadata
entry.content:
this is the error i am getting how to achieve this.

I need to use the api that is created in abap cloud in the integration suite but when i am accessing the metatdata in the odata v2 entity selection i am getting this error.

thanks in advance

entry.title: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to consume odata from BTP build process automation. I have created the destination using the odata url I've created in sap s4 on premise system and the connection is successful.
When I'm trying to create action using odata destinations in build, I'm getting the error 
"The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination"

Can anyone please help me with understanding why I'm getting this and also if there are any other solutions to consume odata in BTP build process automation, let me know.

Regards,
Kiranmayee S V

entry.title: OData service for Fiori Analytical Table - sap.ui.table.AnalyticalTable
entry.content:
Hello dear experts,

I'm looking for information, documentation, tutorials, anything that clarify how to build or annotate an OData service for the Fiori Analytical Table control:

https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/analytical-table-alv/

I would like to expose data from one simple custom Z table in an S/4HANA on premise backend. The approach would ideally be using RAP, but any suggestions are welcome.

 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Douglas

entry.title: I am unable to figure out the odata response body when the message got failed in SAP CPI.
entry.content: we have changed iflow and added sequential multicast at the start of the iflow. When message got failed sequential multicast executed before the exception subprocess and we will get the data from sequential multicast not from the odata response. How to capture this.

entry.title: OData Project with Base64 Content as Input to create attachments in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to create a custom OData Project which can accept Base64 content as the input. I have the logic to convert the Base64 into Xstring and create the attachment.

1) I need help with creating the OData project which accepts BASE64 data and (NOT media type attachment)

2) how to test the odata service from Gateway client

3) how to call this service from SAP ABAP program or UI5 application.

entry.title: Grouping and Subtotal in Fiori Elements List report using OData V4 Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have built a Fiori Elements-based list report application using an OData V4 service. This service consists of CDS views exposed as entities. I have a requirement to implement grouping and subtotals in the Fiori report. I followed the documentation and changed the table type to an Analytical Table in the manifest.json as shown below.

 

Also I have maintained local annotations as per SAP  documentation.

 <Annotations Target="SAP__self.myEntityType">
 <Annotation Term="Aggregation.ApplySupported">
   </Annotation>
<Annotation Term="UI.PresentationVariant">
  <Record Type="UI.PresentationVariantType">
    <PropertyValue Property="GroupBy">
      <Collection>
        <PropertyPath>SalesOrder</PropertyPath>
      </Collection>
    </PropertyValue>
   
    <PropertyValue Property="Visualizations">
      <Collection>
       
        <AnnotationPath>@UI.LineItem</AnnotationPath>
      </Collection>
    </PropertyValue>
  </Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

But when I try to run the app I am getting the error as below.

So if anyone has some idea on how to overcome this, please do provide the inputs.

Thanks in Advance!!!

Best Regards,

Parthu.
